title: Department of Culture and Tourism Abu Dhabi - Full leak published ransomware incident

victim.name: Department of Culture and Tourism Abu Dhabi - Full leak published

extortion.description: [AI generated] The Department of Culture and Tourism Abu Dhabi is a governmental organization in charge of conserving and promoting the Emirate's cultural heritage and tourism sector. They plan festivals, concerts and other cultural events, manage major tourist sites and museums, work to attract international visitors, and regulate the tourism industry in Abu Dhabi.
